title: SITE: Towards Spatial Intelligence Thorough Evaluation
title_zh: SITE：迈向空间智能的全面评估
abstract: Spatial intelligence (SI) represents a cognitive ability encompassing the visualization, manipulation, and reasoning about spatial relationships, underpinning disciplines from neuroscience to robotics. We introduce SITE, a benchmark dataset towards SI Thorough Evaluation in a standardized format of multi-choice visual question-answering, designed to assess large vision-language models' spatial intelligence across diverse visual modalities (single-image, multi-image, and video) and SI factors (figural to environmental scales, spatial visualization and orientation, intrinsic and extrinsic, static and dynamic). Our approach to curating the benchmark combines a bottom-up survey of existing datasets and a top-down strategy drawing upon three classification systems in cognitive science, which prompt us to design two novel types of tasks about view-taking and dynamic scenes. Extensive experiments reveal that leading models fall behind human experts, especially in spatial ori-entation, a fundamental SI factor. Moreover, we demonstrate a positive correlation between a model's spatial reasoning proficiency and its performance on an embodied $A I$ task.
abstract_zh: 空间智能（SI）是一种认知能力，涵盖对空间关系的可视化、操作和推理，支撑着从神经科学到机器人学等多个学科。我们提出了SITE，一个以标准化多选视觉问答格式构建的基准数据集，旨在全面评估大型视觉语言模型的空间智能，涵盖多种视觉模态（单图像、多图像和视频）以及SI因素（从图形到环境尺度、空间可视化和定向、内在与外在、静态与动态）。我们构建基准的方法结合了自下而上的现有数据集调查和自上而下的策略，借鉴认知科学的三种分类系统，从而设计了两种新型任务：视角转换和动态场景。大量实验表明，领先模型落后于人类专家，尤其是在空间定向这一基本SI因素上。此外，我们证明了模型的空间推理能力与其在具身AI任务上的表现呈正相关。
tldr_zh: 提出SITE基准，全面评估视觉语言模型的空间智能，发现模型在空间定向方面落后于人类。
cover_zh: 空间智能大考验｜AI在定向任务上竟被人类碾压？
